metadata.name: Vastu Database — Classifier-Aligned
metadata.description: Rebuilt Vastu database keyed to match the snake_case room slugs used by the YOLOv8 room classifier (vaastu_object_detection.py). Each room carries its OpenCV badge color (BGR), YOLO detection-rule weights, and full Vastu rules for all 8 cardinal/intercardinal directions (severity, label, impact, solution, why).
metadata.color_space_note: badge_color_bgr is BGR (cv2 default), not RGB.

Northeast.impact: Severe health collapse, continuous fever, thyroid dysfunction, anxiety, unresponsive cough, appetite loss, weight loss.
Northeast.solution: Vacate immediately. Relocate to Southwest. Heavy wooden frame. Granite stones. Turmeric and salt. Neem burning.
Northeast.why: Northeast sacred corner polluted by bed. Brahmi energy refuses entry. Sleep becomes impossible.

North.impact: Sleep disorders, nightmares, anxiety, weak immunity, marital conflicts, memory problems, frequent infections, cold extremities.
North.solution: Move to Southwest immediately. Heavy curtains. Amethyst crystals. Durga Chalisa 108x. Camphor burning.
North.why: North Kubera zone drains prosperity during sleep. Cold winds cause Vata imbalance. Magnetic field disrupts brain waves.

East.impact: Insomnia, fever, profuse sweating, vivid nightmares, weight loss, anxiety, irritability, hyperactivity.
East.solution: Move to Southwest within 6 months. Blue or green walls. Heavy curtains. Sandalwood incense. Darker bedroom.
East.why: East Surya zone — intense active fire dries the body, disrupts sleep cycles, creates Pitta imbalance.

Southeast.impact: Violent nightmares, sleep paralysis, marital discord, sexual dysfunction, aggressive waking, family dysfunction, miscarriage risk.
Southeast.solution: Move to Southwest immediately. Water containers at Southeast. Durga Chalisa. White paint. Salt remedy.
Southeast.why: Southeast Agni zone — intense aggressive fire creates extreme Pitta and destroys relationships.

South.impact: 6–7 hours sleep, heavy dreams, stable health, cordial relationships, acceptable but lacks vibrancy.
South.solution: Acceptable temporarily. Upgrade to Southwest in 1–2 years. Warm earth tones. Heavy wooden furniture.
South.why: South Yama zone — stable but too dense, lacks emotional warmth, energy feels heavy.

Southwest.impact: Perfect 8–9 hours deep sleep, marital harmony, enhanced fertility, excellent health, freedom from anxiety, financial stability, sexual satisfaction.
Southwest.solution: Maintain Southwest forever. Solid wood frame. Warm orange walls. Ghee lamp nightly. Family photos.
Southwest.why: Southwest Nairitya goddess — Earth element grounds and stabilizes. Perfect magnetic alignment for sleep.

West.impact: 6–7 hours fair sleep, cordial relationships, minor fluctuations, acceptable health, declining sexual energy.
West.solution: Acceptable temporarily. Plan upgrade in 2–3 years. Warm colors. Wood headboard. Orange accent lighting.
West.why: West Varuna zone — declining peaceful energy, lacks Southwest grounding power.

Northwest.impact: Fragmented sleep, nightmares, sleepwalking, mental confusion, fickleness, chronic worry, hyperactive children, financial instability.
Northwest.solution: Relocate to Southwest in 3–6 months. Heavy stone weights. Brown walls. Dark curtains. Grounding meditation.
Northwest.why: Northwest Vayu zone — chaotic wind energy prevents deep sleep, creates scattered thoughts.

Northeast.impact: Deep family bonds, meaningful discussions, divine blessings, joy radiates, perfect comfort, family gathers joyfully.
Northeast.solution: Maintain Northeast living room forever. Cream or yellow walls. Bright lighting. Comfortable cushions. Warm colors.
Northeast.why: Northeast Ishanya — sacred corner attracts divine blessings. Family bonds deepen. Conversations become meaningful forever.

North.impact: Good family energy with wealth. Harmonious atmosphere, conversations pleasant, adequate bonding.
North.solution: Acceptable. Northeast superior. Warm colors. Good lighting.
North.why: North prosperity supports gathering adequately. Bonding adequate. Conversations pleasant. Results satisfactory.

East.impact: Active lively gathering. Children energetic. Good atmosphere. Bonding active but lacks depth.
East.solution: Acceptable. Northeast superior. Keep bright and attractive.
East.why: East active energy supports gathering adequately. Bonding active. Atmosphere good. Lacks sacred depth.

Southeast.impact: Some friction. Heated discussions. Bonding interrupted. Comfort compromised. Relationships tense sometimes.
Southeast.solution: Consider moving to Northeast in 1–2 years. Cool colors. Peaceful atmosphere. Plants. Extra comfort.
Southeast.why: Southeast fire creates friction. Perfect comfort compromised. Bonding interrupted. Conversations become tense.

South.impact: Heavy suppression. Family reluctant to gather. Conversations strained. Comfort diminished. Bonding suppressed. Relationships burdened.
South.solution: Move to Northeast within 6 months. Bright lights. Light colors. Open space. Mirrors. Maximum comfort.
South.why: South heaviness prevents willing gathering. Comfort feels heavy. Conversations difficult. Bonding suppressed.

Southwest.impact: Complete dysfunction. Family avoids gathering. Conflicts become warfare. No bonding possible. Comfort nonexistent. Toxic environment.
Southwest.solution: Relocate to Northeast immediately. Southwest absolutely destroys family harmony. Never place sofa in Southwest.
Southwest.why: Southwest heaviness completely suppresses bonding. Family avoids gathering. Conflicts emerge. Dysfunction certain.

West.impact: Relaxed comfortable gathering. Pleasant family time. Good bonding. Lacks intensity. Cordial but not deeply connected.
West.solution: Acceptable. Northeast superior. Comfortable seating. Warm lighting.
West.why: West peaceful energy supports relaxation. Comfort excellent. Bonding adequate. Lacks sacred depth.

Northwest.impact: Unstable gathering. Family scattered sometimes. Bonding inconsistent. Conversations superficial. Comfort fluctuates.
Northwest.solution: Consider moving to Northeast in 1–2 years. Grounding elements. Heavy furniture. Stable arrangement.
Northwest.why: Northwest chaotic air creates scattered gathering. Family interaction unstable. Bonding inconsistent.

Northeast.impact: Sacred space polluted, blessings removed, family spirituality destroyed, health deterioration, accidents and burns.
Northeast.solution: Move to Southeast immediately. Never keep stove in Northeast. Block if cannot move. Extensive spiritual cleansing.
Northeast.why: Northeast sacred corner — fire commits a grave violation. All blessings flee. Accidents inevitable.

North.impact: Water–fire conflict, constant leaks, appliance breakdowns, digestive diseases, infections, immune weakness.
North.solution: Relocate to Southeast immediately. High exhaust fans. Red lights. Saffron walls. Daily diya.
North.why: North water zone conflicts with kitchen fire. Food becomes toxic. Water extinguishes fire physically and energetically.

East.solution: Consider moving to Southeast in 1–2 years. Good ventilation. Bright lighting. Copper cookware. Saffron walls.
East.why: East provides some fire but not the concentrated Agni power of Southeast. Benefits partial, joy incomplete.

Southeast.impact: Food becomes medicinal, excellent family health, prosperity increases, radiant skin, strong intelligent children, joy and laughter.
Southeast.solution: Maintain Southeast forever. Saffron or orange walls. Brass or copper utensils. Polished stove. Face East while cooking.
Southeast.why: Southeast Agni zone — the only correct kitchen location. Fire purifies and nourishes food perfectly. Prosperity assured.

South.impact: Heavy energy suppresses cooking fire. Food becomes toxic. Financial blockage. Indigestion common. Obesity develops.
South.solution: Relocate to Southeast within 6 months. Bright red or orange walls. Multiple bright lights. Raised stove on platform.
South.why: South heaviness completely suppresses kitchen fire. Fire imprisoned becomes suffocative, disease-creating.

Southwest.impact: Fire completely suppressed. Food becomes heavy and toxic. Indigestion severe. Total financial blockage. Chronic disease develops.
Southwest.solution: Relocate to Southeast immediately. Bright red or orange walls. Multiple bright lights. Raised stove. Intense fire element.
Southwest.why: Southwest heaviness completely imprisons kitchen fire. Fire becomes suffocative, toxic, disease-creating.

West.impact: Moderate issues. Water–fire conflict. Some appliance issues. Energy waste. Food adequately cooked but not optimal.
West.solution: Consider Southeast relocation in 1–2 years. Bright lighting. Copper cookware. Good ventilation essential.
West.why: West water moderately conflicts with fire. Some energy waste but manageable. Benefits declining.

Northwest.impact: Chaotic unstable energy disrupts cooking. High utility bills. Frequent appliance breakdowns. Food quality inconsistent.
Northwest.solution: Move to Southeast within 6 months. Grounding elements. Heavy copper cookware. Stabilizing measures.
Northwest.why: Northwest air disperses cooking-fire energy, making it unfocused and chaotic. Bills skyrocket.

Northeast.impact: Good cleansing with a sacred touch. Pure water. Health benefits. Overkill for a functional bathroom.

Northeast.why: Northeast sacred energy supports cleansing adequately. Nearly perfect. Health blessed.

North.impact: Moderate water issues. Some moisture. Occasional mold. Good air circulation is critical.
North.solution: Acceptable with ventilation. Use exhaust fans. Good air circulation.

East.impact: Perfect cleansing experience. No moisture issues. Fresh feeling. Optimal clarity. Excellent energy.

Southeast.impact: Fire–water conflict. Some moisture issues. Moderate problems. Occasional damage risk.
Southeast.solution: Consider moving to East in 1–2 years. Excellent ventilation. Cool colors.

South.impact: Heavy water accumulation. Dampness builds. Stagnant feeling. Moisture persists. Mold risk.
South.solution: Plan East relocation. Excellent ventilation. Bright lights.
South.why: South heaviness traps water energy completely. Mold develops inevitably.

Southwest.impact: Chronic moisture. Persistent mold. Respiratory issues. Rapid deterioration. Major problems.
Southwest.solution: Relocate or improve urgently. Add lights and fans. Bright colors.
Southwest.why: Southwest heaviness completely traps water energy. Mold inevitable. Respiratory issues develop.

West.impact: Acceptable cleansing. Water balanced. Fair flow. Acceptable results overall.
West.solution: Acceptable. East preferable. Maintain good ventilation.
West.why: West water is somewhat stable. Results acceptable. Benefits fair.

Northwest.impact: Unstable water flow. Inconsistent drainage. Moisture fluctuates. Unpredictable problems.
Northwest.solution: Move to East within 1–2 years. Multiple fans. Regular maintenance.
Northwest.why: Northwest air disperses water energy inconsistently. Drainage becomes erratic.

Northeast.impact: Divine meals with perfect nourishment. Spiritual dining. Excellent bonding. Blessings present.
Northeast.solution: Very good location. Maintain a bright, clean, spiritual atmosphere.
Northeast.why: Northeast sacred energy blesses meals perfectly. Health multiplied. Prosperity divine.

North.impact: Good family meals with wealth energy. Prosperous dining. Pleasant conversation.
North.solution: Acceptable. West is better. Warm lighting. Family photos.
North.why: North provides prosperity adequately. Meals pleasant. Prosperity present but not as sacred.

East.impact: Active energetic meals. Enthusiastic children. Good digestion. Lively atmosphere.
East.solution: Acceptable. West provides relaxation. Keep bright and active.
East.why: East activity keeps meals lively adequately. Digestion good. Atmosphere active.

Southeast.impact: Warm convivial meals. Heat makes food enjoyable. Good digestion. Pleasant atmosphere.

Southeast.why: Southeast fire warms atmosphere adequately. Meals enjoyable.

South.impact: Heavy dining experience. Slow eating. Stable but felt as weight.
South.solution: Consider moving to West in 1–2 years. Light colors. Good ventilation.

Southwest.impact: Very stable but too heavy. Relationships stable but lack spontaneity. Joy suppressed.

West.impact: Meals become joyful. Family bonds strengthen. Food digests well. Perfect nourishment and bonding.
West.solution: Maintain West dining room forever. Comfortable seating. Warm lighting.

Northwest.impact: Flexible dining arrangements. Mobile family meals. Good bonding. Relaxed gatherings.
Northwest.solution: Acceptable. West better for deep connection. Good seating.
Northwest.why: Northwest flexibility is good for gathering adequately. Meals pleasant. Bonding fair.

office.purpose: Business, commerce, professional work, client meetings, accounts.

Northeast.impact: Sharp clarity for decisions. Intuition reliable. Strategy clear. Honest dealings. Lacks the heat of pure commerce.
Northeast.solution: Very good for advisory, consulting, R&D, or strategy work. Maintain brightness. Keep the corner uncluttered.
Northeast.why: Northeast Ishanya — divine clarity zone. Excellent for thinking work; less suited to aggressive sales.

North.impact: Wealth flows in. Deals close. Cash circulates. Steady client acquisition. Business genuinely prospers.
North.solution: Maintain North office forever. Owner's desk facing North. Cash box / accounts in the North wall. Water feature optional.
North.why: North Kubera zone — the literal direction of wealth. Commerce, cash flow, and growth all align with this energy.

East.impact: Energetic productive work. New ventures launch easily. Sun fuels morning output. Growth-oriented.
East.solution: Acceptable. North superior for cash flow. Keep eastern windows clean. Good for startups in growth mode.
East.why: East Surya zone — active energy supports new initiatives but doesn't anchor wealth the way North does.

Southeast.impact: Productive but volatile. Fire fuels output then burnout. Disputes flare. Lawsuits possible. High employee turnover.
Southeast.solution: Consider moving to North in 1–2 years. Cool colors. Good ventilation. Conflict-resolution practices essential.
Southeast.why: Southeast Agni zone — fire creates intense output but also friction, anger, legal risk in a commercial context.

South.impact: Stagnation. Deals stall. Receivables age. Innovation impossible. Heavy energy crushes momentum.
South.solution: Relocate to North within 6 months. Bright lighting. Mirrors on the North wall. Active workspace, no clutter.
South.why: South Yama zone — heaviness suppresses commerce. Money refuses to move. Decisions become impossibly slow.

Southwest.impact: Stable but heavy for the WORK ITSELF. Ideal for the owner's SEAT inside the office, not for the whole office room.
Southwest.solution: Acceptable only if the office room is small and used mainly by the owner. Otherwise relocate to North.
Southwest.why: Southwest Nairitya — grounding power benefits the boss's chair but suppresses general office productivity.

West.impact: Calm, steady work. Profits stable but modest. Long client relationships. Less innovation, more retention.
West.solution: Acceptable for mature businesses. North better for growth. Warm lighting. Comfortable seating.
West.why: West Varuna zone — peaceful energy retains clients well but doesn't drive aggressive growth.

Northwest.impact: Excellent for client meetings, sales, marketing, networking. Deals close. Movement and momentum strong.
Northwest.solution: Excellent for sales-driven or client-facing teams. North better for accounts and finance functions.
Northwest.why: Northwest Vayu zone — wind element moves opportunities and people. Perfect for closing and networking.

study_room.purpose: Learning, concentration, reading, knowledge, academic work.

Northeast.impact: Divine learning. Enlightenment flows. Exceptional memory. Intelligence blooms. Success practically guaranteed.
Northeast.solution: Excellent location. Maintain brightness. Keep the corner clean and uncluttered. Books face East.
Northeast.why: Northeast divine energy blesses learning with insight. Excellence becomes natural.

North.impact: Good learning with calm focus. Prosperity supports studies. Memory adequate. Concentration fair.
North.solution: Acceptable. East better for sharpness. Cool lighting helpful.
North.why: North calm supports learning adequately. Concentration fair. Results good but not as sharp as East.

East.impact: Learning becomes easy. Sharp memory. Deep concentration. Intelligence flourishes. Academic success certain.
East.solution: Maintain East study. Bright natural light. Desk faces East. Clean organized. Inspiring materials on walls.
East.why: East Sun energy illuminates knowledge and sharpens intellect perfectly. Productivity exceptional always.

Southeast.impact: Energetic studying with scattered focus. High motivation but concentration breaks. Heat burns energy. Some burnout.
Southeast.solution: Consider East move in 1–2 years. Cool colors. Good ventilation. Regular breaks.
Southeast.why: Southeast fire creates energy but heat burns focus. Concentration breaks. Burnout risk.

South.impact: Heavy suppression of learning. Lethargy dominates. Concentration impossible. Weak memory. Constant procrastination.
South.solution: Move to East within 6 months. Bright lights. Light colors. Active workspace.
South.why: South heaviness completely suppresses mental activity. Learning becomes nearly impossible.

Southwest.impact: No focus possible. Severe procrastination. Memory nonexistent. Failure certain. Complete dysfunction.
Southwest.solution: Move to East immediately. Southwest completely blocks all learning. Never study in Southwest.
Southwest.why: Southwest heaviness blocks all learning energy. Focus impossible. Knowledge cannot be retained.

West.impact: Relaxed studying. Comfortable environment. Adequate focus. Knowledge retained. Decent results.
West.solution: Acceptable. East better for sharpness. Comfortable seating. Warm lighting.
West.why: West relaxation aids comfort but dulls sharp focus. Results good but not optimal.

Northwest.impact: Scattered studying. Unstable focus. Mind wanders constantly. Inconsistent performance. Frequent distraction.
Northwest.solution: Move to East in 1–2 years. Grounding elements. Minimal distractions. Stable schedule.
Northwest.why: Northwest chaotic air prevents focused learning. Performance becomes inconsistent.

corridor.purpose: Passage, movement, energy flow between rooms.

Northeast.impact: Energy flows freely throughout the home. Bright cheerful passage. Family movement effortless. Daily life feels light.
Northeast.solution: Maintain Northeast corridor forever. Keep it bright, uncluttered, and well-lit. Light walls. Small plant or lamp at the end.
Northeast.why: Northeast Ishanya — sacred corner. A corridor here channels divine prana through the whole house. Movement becomes auspicious.

North.impact: Smooth daily movement. Prosperity energy circulates. Pleasant well-lit passage. Wealth flow supported.
North.solution: Very good location. Keep clean and well-lit. Avoid heavy storage along the walls.
North.why: North Kubera zone — wealth energy travels comfortably through this passage. Circulation good.

East.impact: Bright, active circulation. Morning light fills the home. Energy refreshed daily. Mood lifted.
East.solution: Excellent. Maintain windows or skylights. Keep eastern end open and bright.
East.why: East Sun energy enters and flows through the corridor each morning, recharging the whole home.

Southeast.impact: Restless passage. Heat builds in summer. Occasional friction as family members cross paths. Energy slightly agitated.
Southeast.solution: Consider moving heavy items elsewhere. Cool light colors on walls. Good ventilation.
Southeast.why: Southeast Agni zone — corridor fire creates agitation in a transit space. Movement feels rushed.

South.impact: Heavy stagnant passage. Movement feels dragging. Family avoids the corridor. Dust and lethargy accumulate.
South.solution: Add bright lights and mirrors. Move heavy storage out within 6 months. Keep the southern end uncluttered.
South.why: South Yama zone — heaviness blocks free passage. Energy stagnates. Daily movement becomes burdensome.

Southwest.impact: Energy completely blocked from circulating. Dark, heavy passage. Family movement minimal. House feels divided.
Southwest.solution: Avoid placing a corridor here. If unavoidable, install bright lights, mirrors on the wall, and keep absolutely uncluttered.
Southwest.why: Southwest Nairitya — heaviest corner. A corridor here traps prana instead of letting it flow.

West.impact: Calm relaxed passage. Evening light pleasant. Smooth movement. Cordial circulation.
West.solution: Acceptable. Maintain warm evening lighting. Keep the western end clear.
West.why: West Varuna zone — peaceful energy supports relaxed circulation in the evening hours.

Northwest.impact: Drafty unstable passage. Wind tunnel effect. Mind feels scattered while walking through. Family interactions brief.
Northwest.solution: Add grounding elements: a small bench, heavy artwork on one wall. Avoid wind tunnels with doors at both ends.
Northwest.why: Northwest Vayu zone — air element accelerates through a corridor here, scattering the energy that should be circulating gently.

Northeast.impact: Divine blessings. All positive enters. Continuous opportunities. Guests blessed. Success flows. Prosperity assured forever.
Northeast.solution: Maintain Northeast entrance forever. Bright saffron paint. Daily lamps. Auspicious symbols. Flowers. Plants.
Northeast.why: Northeast attracts all divinity and opportunity. All blessings assured forever. Prosperity enters continuously.

North.impact: Good opportunity with prosperity. Wealth flows in. Guests feel prosperous. Success likely.
North.solution: Acceptable. Northeast superior. Maintain brightness. Prosperity symbols.
North.why: North brings wealth but lacks Northeast's sacred welcome. Prosperity present but not divine.

East.impact: Bright energetic entry. Active opportunities. Illuminated welcome. Good success. Excellent energy.
East.solution: Excellent. Maintain bright lights and active energy.
East.why: East illumination creates a bright welcoming entry. Success good. Visibility excellent.

Southeast.impact: Energetic active entry. Opportunities flow with heat. Dynamic welcome. Good for business.
Southeast.solution: Acceptable. Can work well. Maintain a bright entrance.
Southeast.why: Southeast fire creates active opportunity flow. Results good. Dynamism high.

South.impact: All wealth flows out. Opportunities leave. Success elusive. Financial ruin. Family struggles. Health problems multiply.
South.solution: Relocate entrance to Northeast immediately. Block South entry completely. Life depends on the change.
South.why: South is the loss direction. Wealth hemorrhages. Opportunities flee. Family trapped. Health deteriorates.

Southwest.impact: Blocked opportunities. Heavy suppression. Progress impossible. Family trapped. Financial collapse. Darkness at entry.
Southwest.solution: Create a Northeast entrance urgently. Block Southwest completely. Life depends on this.
Southwest.why: Southwest, the heaviest zone, crushes all opportunity. Family trapped. Wealth blocked. Darkness permanent.

West.impact: Relaxed welcoming entry. Guests feel comfortable. Moderate opportunities. Fair success.
West.why: West creates a comfortable entry. Guests welcome but opportunities limited.

Northwest.impact: Unstable opportunity entry. Scattered blessings. Inconsistent success. Chaotic opportunities. Moderate problems.
Northwest.solution: Move to Northeast in 1–2 years. Clear organized entry. Grounding elements.
Northwest.why: Northwest chaotic energy creates scattered opportunity flow. Success becomes erratic.

unknown.note: Fallback when YOLO detections do not match any room rule.
